description: End-to-end pipeline view of traces, metrics, and logs through OTel collector receivers, processors, and exporters

panels.description: OTel Collectors. Derived from the `otelcol.process.uptime` metric.

targets.expr: otelcol_process_uptime_seconds_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}

sum(rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_spans_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))
+
sum(rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_spans_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.description: Aggregate ingestion rate across all receivers by telemetry type

targets.expr:
sum(rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_log_records_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))
+
sum(rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_log_records_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Logs

panels.description: Aggregate ingestion rate across all receivers by telemetry type

targets.expr:
sum(rate(otelcol_receiver_accepted_metric_points_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))
+
sum(rate(otelcol_receiver_refused_metric_points_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Metrics

panels.description: Span processors inbound rate, aggregated across all processors

panels.title: Logs

panels.description: Metrics processors inbound rate, aggregated across all processors
panels.title: Metrics

panels.description: Aggregated spans export rate across all exporters

targets.expr: sum(rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_spans_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Spans

panels.description: Aggregated logs export rate across all exporters

targets.expr: sum(rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_log_records_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Logs

panels.description: Aggregate metrics export rate across all exporters

targets.expr: sum(rate(otelcol_exporter_sent_metric_points_total{pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))
